gretit1: glossy blue-black head and throat, bright white cheeks, lemon-yellow underparts split by a broad black central stripe, olive-green back, blue-grey wings with a white wingbar
blutit: azure-blue cap, wings and tail, white face with a thin black eye-stripe, yellow underparts, yellow-green back
eurrob1: rounded plump shape, bright orange-red face and breast bordered with blue-grey, warm brown upperparts, whitish belly
eurbla: uniformly jet-black plumage, bright orange-yellow bill and a narrow yellow eye-ring
comcha: blue-grey crown and nape, pinkish-brown cheeks and breast, chestnut back, bold double white wingbars on black wings, greenish rump
eurmag1: pied black-and-white plumage, white belly and shoulder patches, very long iridescent green-blue tail
eursta: glossy black plumage with green and purple sheen and fine pale spangles, pointed yellow bill, short square tail
houspa: grey crown, chestnut nape and eye-stripe, black bib, pale grey cheeks, streaked brown-and-black back, stout conical bill
eurgol1: vivid red face mask, black-and-white head, warm buff body, black wings crossed by a broad golden-yellow wingbar
barswa: glossy steel-blue upperparts, rufous-red forehead and throat, creamy underparts, long deeply forked tail with fine streamers
comcra: tall slate-grey body, black face and neck with a white stripe running down the side, small red crown patch, drooping bushy tail bustle
whoswa: large all-white swan, long straight neck held erect, wedge-shaped bill with a large triangular lemon-yellow base and black tip
